error_signature: Origin header does NOT match the expected origin
title: Origin header mismatch in Docker setup
symptom: When accessing n8n hosted on Docker, an error indicates that the Origin header does not match the expected origin, causing connection issues.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker container
Accessing n8n via a named URL
not_this_if: Using localhost or default Docker settings
root_cause: The mismatch occurs because the Docker image URL specified in the docker-compose file is incorrect, leading to configuration issues that affect the expected WebSocket connection.
fix_steps: Change the image line from 'image: docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n' to 'image: n8nio/n8n'
agent_instruction: Update the Docker image URL in your docker-compose.yml file and restart the container.
